_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Myxedema coma is defined as severe hypothyroidism leading to decreased mental status, hypothermia, and other symptoms related to slowing of function in multiple organs.
Common symptoms: Nonpitting edema of the lower extremities is sometimes present

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment
Thyroid stimulating hormone (TSH), Free Triiodothyronine (FT3) and Free Thyroxine (FT4) level reports

claim.label: Detailed Indoor Case Papers with treatment given details
Post treatment FTSH, FT3 and FT4 level

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment submitted?
Was the TSH, FT3, FT4 report submitted?
Was the USG thyroid report submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Was Detailed Indoor Case Papers with vital (BP and Pulse) and Treatment details submitted?
Was the post treatment TSH, FT3, FT4 report submitted?
Was the Detailed Discharge Summary submitted with the date of the follow-up mentioned?

common_queries: The thyroid report is not suggestive of hypothyroidism at the time of pre-authorization.
Clinical notes, evaluation findings, indications, or planned line of treatment are missing or incomplete at pre-authorization.
TSH, FT3, or FT4 level reports are missing or incomplete at pre-authorization.
Detailed Indoor Case Papers with vital (BP and Pulse) or treatment details are missing or incomplete at claim submission.
Post-treatment FTSH, FT3, or FT4 level reports are missing or incomplete at claim submission.
The detailed discharge summary is missing or does not include the date of follow-up.

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: DNB / MD equivalent in (General Medicine / Pediatric Medicine), DM Endocrinology & Metabolism
clinical_key_pointers: Proceed with Myxedema coma only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation:
